title: Cumulative clause
doc_html:
§4720.68.  Cumulative clause

The powers conferred by this Chapter shall be in addition and supplemental to the powers conferred by any other law.

Acts 2004, No. 349, §1.
doc_text:
§4720.68.  Cumulative clause
The powers conferred by this Chapter shall be in addition and supplemental to the powers conferred by any other law.
Acts 2004, No. 349, §1.
